Case Studies

THE NUMBERS DON'T LIE.
THE SCREENSHOTS DON'T EITHER.

Every result below is pulled directly from Klaviyo dashboards. No projections. No "potential" revenue. Just real dollars, from real emails, to real customers.

THE $2.1M EMAIL SYSTEM
+277%
Growth
$2.16M
Revenue

BEFORE: Emails going out but revenue wasn't coming back. Flows were set up but barely moving the needle. AFTER: $2,168,751 attributed revenue. $1.46M from flows alone. 277% growth.

THE SITUATION

This brand had Klaviyo set up and emails were going out. But the account wasn't pulling its weight — campaigns sent without segmentation, flows either missing or barely converting, and no clear line between email and revenue.

WHY IT COMPOUNDED

The other 67% — $1.46 million — came from automated flows. Sequences that triggered based on behavior, not a calendar. That's the difference between an email list and an email system.

NEO SABERS
+455%
Growth
$128K
Revenue

BEFORE: Good overall revenue, but email wasn't pulling its weight. Most revenue came from direct traffic and paid ads — no retention system. AFTER: $128K/month. 12 automated flows. 455% growth in 30 days.

THE SITUATION

NEO Sabers was generating solid overall revenue, but email marketing was an afterthought. Most of their money came from direct traffic and paid ads — meaning they were constantly paying to acquire new customers instead of monetizing the ones they already had. Key automation flows were either missing or underperforming. There was no segmentation strategy, campaigns weren't planned strategically, and SMS marketing was barely being used. The repeat purchase rate was well below industry potential, and abandoned carts and browse sessions were going completely unrecovered. In short: they had the traffic, the customers, and the demand — but no structured retention system to turn any of it into repeatable revenue.

WHAT WE DID

We built the retention engine from scratch. Every flow was rebuilt or created: welcome series, abandoned cart, browse abandonment, post-purchase, win-back — 12 automated flows capturing revenue at every stage of the customer journey. Campaigns were planned strategically with proper segmentation — so every send had a reason to exist. SMS was activated as a second channel. That means every time someone browses the site, abandons a cart, or makes a purchase — they get the right message, at the right time, without the brand lifting a finger.

$23K → $128K

BEFORE: Massive fanbase, email not keeping up. AFTER: $385K attributed to email. 53% of total revenue. 257% growth.

THE SITUATION

BioWare Gear had a massive, passionate fanbase and an email list to match. But the strategy wasn't keeping up.

WHAT WE DID

New product launch sequences, collection-based campaigns, fan engagement flows. Every send had a reason to exist.

BEFORE: Average results. Average open rates. No segmentation. AFTER: 60.4% open rate. 4/4 Excellent ratings. Industry average is 25-35%.

THE SITUATION

An eCommerce brand with a solid product, a healthy list, and results that were average at best.

WHAT WE DID

Segmentation that made every email feel personal. No campaign went to the full list. We cleaned the list first, then built momentum: 7 campaigns in 30 days with open rates that went up, not down.

About

THE GUY BEHIND
THE REVENUE.

Your Klaviyo account is either making you money while you sleep — or it isn't.

If your flows aren't generating revenue daily, the cost isn't theoretical — it's compounding. Not next month. Today. If your campaigns aren't segmented and your list isn't clean, every send is reaching a fraction of the people it could, at a fraction of the conversion rate it should.

I'm Muhammad Ahmad. I've spent 5 years doing one thing: turning Klaviyo accounts from afterthoughts into the most profitable channel in the business. The method is called The Email Revenue Engine™ — diagnose, deploy, drive.

The results? $23K → $128K. $108K → $385K. $2.1M from a single account.

BioWare Gear. Bethesda Gear. They didn't hire me because I had a nice pitch deck. They stayed because the ROI made it stupid not to.

The Email Revenue Engine™

HERE'S EXACTLY WHAT HAPPENS

Your Klaviyo starts generating revenue 24/7 without you touching it. Welcome series, abandoned cart, browse abandonment, post-purchase, win-back — all live and converting within 20 days. You wake up to revenue you didn't manually create.

→ DAYS 1-20

DRIVE

Revenue compounds month over month while you focus on product. Monthly campaigns, A/B testing, performance reporting, and continuous optimization — your email channel gets stronger over time, not weaker.

→ ONGOING

Common Objections

YOU'RE PROBABLY THINKING
ONE OF THESE.

What kind of results can I expect? +
While results vary based on your business, our clients typically see measurable growth within 90 days, including increased profits, higher retention rates, and sustainable revenue growth. For example, one client grew from $108K → $385K within 60 days.
What happens if I don't see results? +
We stand by our work with a performance guarantee. If we don't increase your email and SMS revenue within 90 days, we'll continue working for free until we do. Your success is our top priority.
We've tried email marketing. It doesn't work for us. +
It didn't work because it wasn't built as a system. A few campaigns and a welcome email isn't a strategy — it's a checkbox. We haven't missed yet for a brand doing $100K+/month. The channel works. The execution didn't.
This sounds expensive. +
One of our clients went from $23K to $128K/month. That's $105K in additional monthly revenue. The question isn't whether you can afford this — it's whether you can afford not to. If we don't increase your revenue in 90 days, we work for free until we do.
